summary: First testing pass completed. All backend APIs (18/18 tests) and frontend features tested successfully. Backend returns 25 gates and 20 amenities correctly. All tab navigation, search/filter functionality, and offline caching working as expected.

minor.issue: Logger used before definition (lines 102, 109 use logger but it's defined at line 157). Does not break functionality but should be moved.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use 'boxShadow'. Also 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated. These are Expo/React Native warnings and do not affect functionality.

action_items: Optional: Move logger definition in server.py before startup function to avoid using before definition
Optional: Update deprecated shadow* props to boxShadow in StyleSheet (low priority, does not affect functionality)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: All 3 API endpoints working correctly with proper data validation
✓ Backend: MongoDB _id correctly excluded from all responses
✓ Backend: Seeding is idempotent (only seeds if collections are empty)
✓ Frontend: All 4 tabs navigable with proper testID attributes
✓ Frontend: Gates search and side filters (All, North, South, East, West) working
✓ Frontend: Amenities category filters (restaurant, grocery, bus_stop, taxi_stand, meqat) working
✓ Frontend: Settings tab shows connection status, cached data counts, sync and clear cache buttons
✓ Frontend: Map tab shows Leaflet map with gate markers, Kaaba marker, nearest gate panel, and route controls
✓ Frontend: Offline caching with AsyncStorage implemented correctly
✓ Frontend: Uses proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput)
Note: All distances show 0m because no real GPS location available in preview environment (expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: Backend automatically seeds 25 gates and 20 amenities on startup if collections are empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs return correct data with proper filtering. Frontend tabs, search, filters, and offline caching all functional. Only minor non-breaking issues found (logger definition order, deprecation warnings).
rca_of_issue: No critical issues found. App is fully functional.
